rationale: Wrap the implication-style ensures in `assert(LHS ==> det_equal) by { if LHS { ... } }` so the two trigger-disjoint `SingleDelivery::receive_real_packet` instances become live hypotheses sharing the same `(pre_self_, pkt)`; case-split on the `pre_self_@.new_single_message(pkt@)` guard (which depends only on `pre@` and `pkt@`, so both runs take the same branch), pin each `post_i@` to the same abstract `SingleDelivery` value (insert-update vs. unchanged), close the abstract `receive_state` / `send_state` via `Map::ext_equal` (`=~=`), and finish with the concrete `epmap == epmap` that `det_receive_real_packet_impl_equal` checks.
